title: Bionano's OGM Test Gets $1,264 CMS Payment Rate for Genetic Testing
text: Bionano Genomics announced that CMS posted a preliminary payment determination for CPT code 81354 covering optical genome mapping for constitutional genetic disorders. The payment rate is set at $1,263.53, effective January 1, 2026. This represents a significant validation of OGM technology for genetic disorder diagnosis. The new code establishes reimbursement for whole genome analysis detecting structural and copy number variations. Applications include postnatal genetic testing for developmental delay, intellectual disabilities, and autism spectrum disorder. The $1,263.53 rate is notably higher than traditional microarray codes (81228 at $900, 81229 at $1,160), reflecting OGM's superior detection capabilities. Bionano now has two active Category I CPT codes: 81195 for hematologic malignancies (reimbursement increased 47% to $1,853.22) and 81354 for constitutional genetic disorders. The reimbursement pathway represents a major milestone for commercial adoption.
